concepts: The sexual orientations of the two friends
current_setting: the first person is straight and the second person is lesbian
new_settings: the first person is lesbian and the second person is straight

concepts: The genders of the two friends
current_setting: the first person is a woman and the second person is a woman
new_settings: the first person is a man and the second person is a man

concepts: The stage of each friend’s romantic relationship (straight friend has a new girlfriend; lesbian friend is still getting to know her partner)
current_setting: the first person has a new girlfriend and the second person is still getting to know her partner
new_settings: the first person is still getting to know her partner and the second person has a new girlfriend

concepts: The fact that both individuals are friends of the narrator
current_setting: both individuals are friends of the narrator
new_settings: the first person is a friend of the narrator and the second person is not a friend of the narrator

concepts: The setting where the interaction occurs (they came over to visit the narrator)
current_setting: they came over to visit the narrator
new_settings: they met at a coffee shop
